# TODO


## CLI

- [x] Multi-format rendering: `calepin render file.qmd -t html,latex,pdf-latex`
- [ ] `calepin preview` on a website should watch all `.qmd` files in the content/ directory


## Rendering

- [ ] Split CSS into core and style
- [ ] Better CSS
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] 404.qmd
- [ ] *Calepin* always in italics with capital letter in website/
- [ ] Language / localization (`lang:` option, custom translation strings)
- [ ] Allow users to supply `postprocess.latex` or `postprocess.html` in `_calepin/`
- [ ] How do lettered appendices work?


## Templates

- [ ] Convert `src/structures/tabsets` and friends to templates where possible
- [ ] Convert element templates to MiniJinja and simplify the dispatch


## Code execution

- [ ] How can an R chunk add content to the LaTeX preamble?
- [ ] Code annotation (line markers `# <1>` with numbered explanations)
- [ ] Multiple figures from a single code chunk with `fig-subcap`
- [ ] Layout attributes on code chunks (`layout-ncol`, `layout`)
- [ ] Column option for code output placement (`column: margin`, `column: page`, etc.)
- [ ] Diagrams: Penrose (requires trio format -- three separate files, not inline code)
- [ ] docx should be more powerful and maybe not go through pandoc


## Tables

- [ ] `knitr_print()` support
- [ ] `tinytable`
- [ ] `gt`
- [ ] `flextable`
- [ ] `knitr::kable()`
- [ ] Tables should use a template and filter
- [ ] Advanced table features (Bootstrap classes, embedded markdown in cells)
- [ ] Subtables
- [ ] Table caption location: margin


## Math

- [ ] Typst math is currently suppressed
- [ ] LaTeX to Typst math plugin


## Layout

- [ ] Column classes (`.column-body`, `.column-page`, `.column-screen`, `.column-margin`)
- [ ] Outset variants (`.column-body-outset`, `.column-page-inset`)
- [ ] Left/right overflow (`.column-screen-left`, `.column-page-right`, etc.)
- [ ] Margin content (`.column-margin` for text, figures, tables)
- [ ] Margin references (`reference-location: margin`)
- [ ] Margin citations (`citation-location: margin`)
- [ ] Margin captions (`cap-location: margin`, `fig-cap-location: margin`)
- [ ] PDF page geometry options (`geometry:` front matter)
- [ ] Screen inset shaded (`column: screen-inset-shaded`)


## Cross-references

- [ ] Custom cross-reference types
- [ ] Code listing cross-references (`#lst-` prefix)
- [ ] Callout cross-references
- [ ] Custom numbered float types


## HTML

- [ ] Do not base64 by default?
- [ ] Embed resources


## calepin new

- [ ] Built-in website template
- [ ] Built-in minimal website template
- [ ] Built-in blog template
- [ ] Example sites: arelbundock.com, countrycode, tinytable, modelsummary, marginaleffects


## Plugins

- [ ] Stable template API is too large: exposing too many template variables as public API locks in internal rendering details
- [ ] How to register new plugins? What are they allowed to do?
- [ ] ANSI colors in txtfmt plugin
- [ ] CSL helpers: https://github.com/citation-style-language/styles/


## Quarto compatibility

- [ ] Decide on a minimal set of supported Quarto preamble features
- [ ] YAML to TOML translation layer


## File paths

- [ ] Strict, consistent, simple, cross-platform
- [ ] Clear separation of output and input locations
- [ ] Format-specific path handling (Typst, LaTeX, HTML, Markdown)
- [ ] Tectonic path resolution quirks


## Docs

- [ ] HTML sales pitch: classless CSS, standalone files by default


## Internal

- [ ] Performance profiling
- [ ] Architecture refactor / DRY / simplification
- [ ] Singular vs Plural file names
- [ ] User input validation. Brainstorm with AI to be super strict and informative. Paths, formats, front matter options, etc.


## Manual code review

- [ ] `src/filters/`
- [ ] `src/render/`
- [ ] `src/formats/`
- [ ] `src/structures/`
- [ ] `src/parse/`
- [ ] `src/` (root modules: main, types, plugins, cli, util, website, site_builder, preview, compile)
